name: Pitch Shifter
description: This algorithm performs pitch shifting, using a time-domain algorithm [98] . The pitch shift amount is the sum of the various shift amount parameters and the CV input. The algorithm was extracted from the disting EX ‘Tracker’ algorithm, as was the disting NT’s ‘Tracker’, below. As such these two algorithms make a natural pairing.
gui_description: The display shows the current shift amount in cents.

parameters.name: Shift algorithm
parameters.description: Chooses the pitch shifting algorithm, ‘2-phase’ or ‘3-phase’. The latter usually sounds better, at the expense of more CPU usage.

parameters.name: Grain delay
parameters.description: The maximum length of the delay line used by the pitch shifter. The mean latency of the algorithm is half this value.

parameters.name: Octaves
parameters.description: The pitch shift amount, in octaves.

parameters.name: Semitones
parameters.description: The pitch shift amount, in semitones.

parameters.name: Cents
parameters.description: The pitch shift amount, in cents.

parameters.name: Output mode
parameters.description: The standard Add/Replace mode selector as described above.

input_ports.name: Audio input
input_ports.description: The bus to use as the audio input.

input_ports.name: Shift input
input_ports.description: The bus to use as a V/octave pitch shift amount CV.

input_ports.name: Audio input
input_ports.description: The bus to use as the audio input.

input_ports.name: Shift input
input_ports.description: The bus to use as a V/octave pitch shift amount CV.
